OBJECTION AND REQUEST OF DIMITRI VAYNBLAT TO DISREGARD EXIGEN, ET AL.'S UNAUTHORIZED REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION ON X-COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VAYNBLAT, DIMITRI

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS EXIGEN, LTD. AND GREGORY SHENKMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY LITIGATION ON CROSS-COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM FEB-06-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-26-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 26, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ANOTHER SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS EXIGEN, LTD. AND GREGORY SHENKMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION & MOTION TO STAY LITIGATION ON CROSS-COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE UNSECURED NOTE EXPRESSLY REFERENCES CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S BONUSES. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THAT WILL BE AN ISSUE IN THE NOTE CASE AND DEPENDING ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AND THE DECISION RENDERED, THERE MAY BE NO NEED FOR THE ARBITRATION. THERE ALSO IS THE POSSIBILITY OF CONFLICTING RULINGS IF BOTH THE LITIGATION AND THE ARBITRATION SIMULTANEOUSLY PROCEED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
